subcodes.title: Words spoken at Rue St. Didier 30 in Paris, 1913-02-20
subcodes.first_line: Now Europe in reality is in the utmost beauty and adornment. Material civilization has advanced greatly. It is a body in the utmost of comeliness, but regrettable it is that it is not animated by the spirit.
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @spiritualization of humanity in the future; a new race of men, @critique of Western values; culture, @call to action, @material and spiritual existence; two books
